product.name: Apple iPhone
selling_points: Product type: flagship smartphone in the consumer electronics category.
A premium smartphone for everyday creators and busy users, making it easy to capture sharp daily moments, stay connected, and move smoothly between messages, calls, photos, and navigation.

creative_strategy.core_pain: You miss spontaneous moments because the camera isn’t ready and fast action turns into a blur.
creative_strategy.promise: A premium smartphone that opens fast and captures sharp everyday moments in one tap.

character.appearance: Young adult in late 20s with medium skin tone, short dark hair, natural look.
character.wardrobe: White crew-neck tee with a light gray cardigan and dark jeans.
character.hair_makeup: Neat hair; minimal, natural makeup for a clean lifestyle look.
character.performance_style: Calm, realistic micro-expressions; controlled movements, no exaggeration.

scene.location: Sunlit modern living room in a city apartment.
scene.lighting: Soft natural window light with gentle shadows; premium, clean feel.
scene.background: Neutral beige sofa, light wood coffee table, one potted plant, sheer white curtains; uncluttered.
key_props: Matte black smartphone with edge-to-edge display (no visible logo)
Small tan dog toyed with a red plush ball

product.visual_identity: Premium, slim smartphone inspired by iPhone design: edge-to-edge glass display, thin black bezels, aluminum edges, dual-camera bump; shown with a matte black case; no brand marks.
product.proof_prop: Fast capture of a moving pet and a large on-screen captured image.

shots.visual_prompt: Vertical, locked-off medium-wide shot in a bright, minimalist living room. The young adult raises a matte black smartphone with the screen dark as a small tan dog springs up to catch a red plush ball in the foreground. The user swipes at the dark screen, trying to open the camera, then looks up as the dog lands—subtle, disappointed exhale. Clean, premium composition with soft, natural light and uncluttered background.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: Vertical still frame: medium-wide composition in a sunlit modern living room. Neutral beige sofa and light wood table behind. The young adult in white tee and light gray cardigan holds a matte black smartphone mid-raise at chest height; the phone screen is dark/off, thumb near the lower edge as if about to swipe. Foreground right shows the small tan dog crouched, ready to jump toward a red plush ball just entering frame. Soft window light from left, gentle shadows, no logos, calm premium look.
shots.negative_prompt: handheld/shaky camera, horror mood, cluttered or messy room, extreme facial expressions, gore, unsafe pet actions, split screen, collage, fake logos or brand marks, tiny unreadable UI text, complex interface overlays, screen glare, heavy reflections, moire, flicker, banding, double phone, warped phone geometry, extra fingers, distorted hands, mirrors or glass tables, exaggerated motion blur
shots.audio: Quick light percussive sting, a soft phone buzz SFX, natural room tone; subtle disappointed sigh. No voiceover.

shots.visual_prompt: Vertical, locked-off close medium shot centered on the smartphone held in both hands at chest height. The camera preview is already open, framing the same small tan dog with a red plush ball in the bright living room. As the dog leaps, the user calmly taps a large white circular shutter button once. A crisp shutter click is heard. The user then tilts the phone slightly toward the lens so the screen fills most of the frame, showing the captured photo: the dog mid-air, sharp and bright against the neutral room. Hold for a moment so the sharp image is clear. Premium, minimalist, soft lighting.
shots.start_key_image_prompt: Vertical still frame: close medium composition focusing on a matte black, edge-to-edge smartphone held steadily in two hands at chest height. The camera app preview is already open on screen with a simple, clean interface—large white circular shutter button centered at the bottom, no text labels. The preview frames the small tan dog standing ready with a red plush ball in the same sunlit living room (beige sofa, plant softly out of focus). Screen is bright and clear with minimal reflections. No logos.
shots.negative_prompt: fake or invented brand logos, dense UI text, cluttered overlays, split screen, montage, shaky handheld, screen glare, heavy reflections, unreadable micro text, warped phone, extra fingers, duplicated devices, motion trails, harsh contrast, mirrors or glass reflections, pet distress, exaggerated expressions, low-res or noisy screen content
shots.audio: Clean, confident beat fades in; soft whoosh as the phone tilts; crisp camera shutter click; music continues warm and minimal. Optional gentle VO: “Capture it, fast.”
